feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I need to send an invoice in both Excel and CSV formats via email.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

The current code snippet is sending e mail in xls format. Now the requirement is I need to send email in both Excel and CSV formats.

code:

"merging header and item rows
IF lv_header IS NOT INITIAL AND lv_item IS NOT INITIAL .
CONCATENATE lv_header cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline lv_item INTO lv_excel.
ENDIF.

"converting to binary
TRY.
cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_solix(
EXPORTING
iv_string = lv_excel
iv_codepage = '4103' "suitable for MS Excel, leave empty
iv_add_bom = 'X' "for other doc types
IMPORTING
et_solix = lt_binary_content ).
CATCH cx_bcs.
MESSAGE e005.
ENDTRY.

"add attchement
CALL METHOD lo_document->add_attachment
EXPORTING
i_attachment_type = 'xls'
i_attachment_subject = lv_subject
i_att_content_text = lt_cont_text
i_att_content_hex = lt_binary_content.

* add document to send request
CALL METHOD lo_send_request->set_document( lo_document ).

Please guide me how to do this or if you have any sample code for help.

Thank you.

entry.title: Can we replicate data from ABAP CDS View having input parameter through SDI(Smart Data Integration)
entry.content:
I am trying to replicate data from ABAP CDS view which is having input parameter to HANA DB through SDI (Smart Data Integration). We created remote source using ABAP Adapter in SAP HANA and created virtual table on top of it.

ABAP CDS View with Input Parameter(Document Number)

 

When we do SELECT on that virtual table we get below error.

When you add the virtual table in flowgraph, the document number input parameter is not coming up.

 

 

Is it possible to replicate data from ABAP CDS View using Flowgraph? If no, what are the options to replicate the data from parameterized ABAP CDS View to SAP HANA ?

 

@GNS @GNS1 

Thank You

Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

ABAP Development  SAP HANA smart data integration SAP Landscape Transformation replication server

entry.title: Integrating MM SD creating SD sales order using PO
entry.content:
Hello SAP expert,

I have used this link https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/integrating-mm-amp-sd-modules-in-same-client-to-create-delivery-in/ba-p/13238322 to customize the MM SD integration flow.

I can generate the outbound idoc type ORDER05 but the inbound idoc is not generated. I have followed all the steps described carefully. If there was an issue during the creation of the sales order, at least an inbound idoc should be created in status 51?

I do not know where to look at to solve this issue.

thank your for your appreciate help

Best regards,

Christophe

entry.title: Workflow User Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

ABAP Development SAP Workflow Management 

In a PO Release Workflow have fork with 5 branches , First branch mail will be send to user outlook once PO created/ changed he apporove/reject there , if he approve PO gets released then workflow end.

Next Branch , User will go to ME28 and release the PO then PO gets released ,Mail will be send workflow ends.

Issue is for one user when he use ME28 to Release ,PO is Released/Released event occured  but Mail step not Triggered .

 

I have tried using SWUE event is tiggered ,Mail step is completed.This issue is happening only when using ME28 for xxxx User , No issue with other users

Difference I noticed ,When Release through SWUE

 

When Release happening through ME28, I see here internal RFC call.

 

Please Guide here.

entry.title: Join 3 tables
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Can you help me join these 3 tables?

  SELECT ebeln
         bsart
    FROM ekko
    INTO TABLE it_ekko
   WHERE bsart = 'ZLSR'.

  IF it_ekko IS NOT INITIAL.
    SELECT ebeln,
           ebelp,
           matnr,
           werks,
           menge,
           bwtty,
           bwtar
      FROM ekpo
       FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_ekko
     WHERE ebeln = @IT_ekko-ebeln
      INTO TABLE @IT_ekpo.

    IF it_ekpo IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT stprs,
             matnr,
             bwkey,
             bwtar,
             bwtty
        FROM mbew
         FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_ekpo
       WHERE matnr = @IT_ekpo-matnr
         AND bwkey = @IT_ekpo-werks
        INTO TABLE @IT_mbew.

        IF sy-subrc = 0.
        ENDIF.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

I've already tried this and it's not getting the right record. 

SELECT c~stprs,
       c~matnr,
       c~bwkey,
       c~bwtar,
       c~bwtty
  FROM ekko AS A
    INNER JOIN ekpo AS b
          ON a~ebeln = b~ebeln
    INNER JOIN mbew AS c
          ON c~matnr = b~matnr
         AND c~bwkey = b~werks
  WHERE a~bsart = 'ZLSR'
  INTO TABLE @DATA(it_temp).

 With using the first code sample IT_MBEW gets 41 records while using the 2nd code sample, IT_TEMP gets 112 records.

entry.title: How to create a CDS File for Fiori Elements app in SAP BAS so that ObjModel associations work
entry.content: Hello, I've created a CDS file so that I can control which data fields I have access to while developing my Fiori Elements app on SAP BAS. One issue I have run into though is that my "@ObjectModel.foreignKey.association:" associations to get more information do not work. On the association columns themselves (i.e. the column _DataField) has the error: Association (not relevant for BW Query) [Analytics] (e.g. Association _SOLDTOPARTY at Line 24 Column 4 is ignored (not relevant for BW Query) [Analytics])). Does anyone know of a way I can either get the association to work, or a different way in which I can create a CDS view/service that will be available in SAP BAS, to use as the basis for a Fiori Elements app?

entry.title: SAP ECC Spark to Intel migration on Solaris 10
entry.content:
Dear Community,

We are currently working on a project in Saudi Arabia. Our people are renovating a local data center and they were made aware of a very old SAP ECC 6 system. It is a full rack with two SUN Spark M5000 server nodes and a SUN StorageTek 6140 from around 2005.

The system is no longer in use but still functional. The new owner wants to secure the data and has asked us whether the physical system can be moved to a local VM or a cloud platform? The entire rack is to be removed, therefore a safe and hopefully simple migration of the system would have to be planned.

Our DBA has taken a full database export dump and also a full RMAN backup from the underlying Oracle DB system, but we have no experience in migrating the ECC application stack. Kindly note, this platform is running on Solaris 10 on Spark, but we also have virtual machines for Solaris 10 on Intel available.

Ideally the migration would be from physical Solaris 10 on Spark to virtual Solaris 10 on Intel. There are no current users working with this system, but data retention in Saudi is now 10 years and up to 15 years in special cases, therefore the system must be preserved for this purpose only.

We have a strong Oracle DB team but need someone supporting us in the application stack migration.

Thank you.

entry.title: Custom fields in MIRO Enhancement with BAdI mrm_item_custfields not appearing
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Using mrm_item_custfields for implementing the custom tab in MIRO item level. 

I followed the below thread to implement the custom tab in the MIRO item level and also created the  append structure and added the fields to RSEG table. 

http://tyruan.blogspot.com/2013/09/to-enhance-standard-miro-detail-screen.html

Other than my screen inputs all other values are appearing (in t_drseg_custom TYPE tdrseg_cust ). I can see my fields are there in the debugging screen but values are not passed. 

Please help me  where did I miss and how to fix this? Many thanks. 

Note:

Tried with other Q&A post, discussions but no helps/response.

Please response and much appreciated for providing your answers here.

Thanks.

entry.title: C_ABAPD: SAP Certified Associate - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am a fresher and I want to obtain C_ABAPD certification. 

Question1: C_ABAPD certification is for fresher ? Can a fresher get this certification?
Question2: Is their any certification guide available for C_ABAPD certification from SAP PRESS?
I am not getting any proper guide for the preparation. Please help.

Thank You.

entry.title: ABAP CDS extractor on MBV_MBEWH is not showing as Delta in Replication Flow (DataSphere)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created a ABAP CDS delta extractor on MBV_MBEWH using CDC. SAP recommends to use MBV_MBEWH and not the table MBEWH directly. When the extractor is used in DataSphere Replication flow we do not get the option for delta.

Note - We are getting warning "Definition of view is too complex for automatic CDS" and "Data extraction of CDS entity not possible" in ABAP perspective. We ignored the warning as it was for other extractor's as well and they are fine.

Please let me know if we should create the delta extractor on table MBEWH directly? if not how can we resolve the issue.

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: No entry in ODQMON and DHCDCMON after doing the Initial and Initial&Delta load in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using replication flow in Datasphere to load data from S4HANA to Azure. We have observed that no entry is available in ODQMON  or DHCDCMON after doing the Initial and Initial&Delta load in Datasphere. Also the entries are not available in the /1DH/ML* and /1DH/SL* tables. The /1DH/OBSERVE_LOGTAB and /1DH/PUSH_CDS_DELTA jobs are scheduled and running fine in source.

The delta data is loaded in azure using the ABAP CDS extractors (example - C_PurchaseOrderDEX or C_PurchaseOrderItemDEX) and the data is available in Azure. 

Do we expect entry in ODQMON  or DHCDCMON? if yes why it is not showing up and what can be done to have these extractor entry.

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills / Solutions and Templates name
entry.content:
I started learning Acquiring Core ABAP Skills. 

 

As I tried to complete the exercises and wanted to check the solutions or looking for templates, I couldn't find them under the given package or class name in Eclipse. (see examples below).

 

Did I possibly overlook something, or have the solution packages/classes been renamed?

entry.title: Extended text on SAPScript does not display on the next page.
entry.content:
So I have 3 pages on my SAP Script. Initially it was just 2 pages.

Page 1 contains 2 columns. On column left, the standard text Z_TXT_001 is called. On column right, Z_TXT_002 is called. 

Page 2 contains 2 columns again. On column left, Z_TXT_003 was called. On column right, Z_TXT_004 was called.

The Z_TXT_002 text was too long for the column on page 1. The remaining text was called on the 2nd page and after that continuation, the Z_TXT_003 was displayed.

 

Now my problem is the Z_TXT_004 is also too long for Page 2 Column Right. However, its text does not continue on the third page column left. Why is that?

entry.title: Input validation in module pool
entry.content:
Hi all,

For a module pool program I have 'WERKS' and 'LGORT' as two inputs field.

I maintained WERKS, LGORT along with other fields in a custom table.

I used POV event on WERKS field.

Now when user select any of the WERKS from table the respective LGORT field from table should be selected and displayed on second input field 'LGORT'.

The field validation can be done using CHAIN ENDCHAIN. but my program contain different validation inside chain and end chain.

PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  LOOP AT IT_ITEMS.
    CHAIN.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-ITEM_NO.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-MATNR.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-MENGE.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-MEINS.
      MODULE check_material.
      MODULE TC_ISSREQ_MODIFY ON CHAIN-REQUEST.
    ENDCHAIN.
    FIELD IS_ITEMS-XFELD
    MODULE TC_ISSREQ_MARK ON REQUEST.
  ENDLOOP.

How to validate WERKS(IS_REQ-WERKS) field and pass LGORT(IS_REQ-LGORT) to second field. please suggest..

CHAIN ENDCHAIN processing items fields from item table, but I need to validate header fields from header table, how to write code for this?

entry.title: saplyphtesttest create a alv
entry.content:
REPORT z_alv_example.

" 数据声明
DATA: gt_data TYPE TABLE OF spfli,
gs_data TYPE spfli.

" ALV相关声明
DATA: gt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat,
gs_fieldcat TYPE lvc_s_fcat,
gt_layout TYPE lvc_s_layo,
gt_events TYPE slis_t_event,
gs_event TYPE slis_alv_event.

" 数据选择
SELECT * FROM spfli INTO TABLE gt_data.

" 准备字段目录
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CARRID' '航空公司' 10.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CONNID' '航班连接编号' 10.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CITYFROM' '出发城市' 20.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CITYTO' '目的城市' 20.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'AIRPFROM' '出发机场' 20.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'AIRPTO' '目的机场' 20.

" 显示ALV
CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY'
EXPORTING
i_structure_name = 'SPFLI'
it_fieldcat = gt_fieldcat
TABLES
t_outtab = gt_data
EXCEPTIONS
program_error = 1
OTHERS = 2.

IF sy-subrc <> 0.
WRITE: / 'Error in ALV display'.
ENDIF.

" 准备字段目录的子程序
FORM prepare_fieldcat USING p_fieldname p_coltext p_outputlen.
CLEAR gs_fieldcat.
gs_fieldcat-fieldname = p_fieldname.
gs_fieldcat-seltext_m = p_coltext.
gs_fieldcat-outputlen = p_outputlen.
APPEND gs_fieldcat TO gt_fieldcat.
ENDFORM.

entry.title: After reversing Move-in, reads with RR 06 are not getting reversed neither coverting to interim MRO
entry.content: @SAPSupport@@Sap @SAPSupport1 @sapsap30 @#sap isu#

entry.title: How can I use a range as a filter in cds views
entry.content:
I want the abap cds view to filter (as parameters) on a range of dates. 

Example 

 

select * from table where dates between :p1 and :p2 ; 

how do I do this ? ( p1 and p2 are parameters )

entry.title: XK02 -FLGDEFAULT does not coincide with ADR6-FLGDEFAULT
entry.content:
Hi all:

We have at least one case where the record that indicates the default email address (FLGDEFAULT) in ADR6 does not coincide with the info show in XK02 (Vendor detail).

XK02 shows, as a default address, the number 002 record:

But, if I check the ADR6 table, I get the following info:

We have already checked and LFA1-ADRNR coincides with ADR6-ADDRNUMBER.

Any ideas?

TIA,

Luis

entry.title: Abap erro SD059 Documentation does not exist
entry.content:
Hello to all , i have a problem with my z report , when it runs indialog is fine but when it runs in background it give me this error

 

 

SD0059 

But i made 3 different documentation in 3 languages and still de same eror , i don't think it is like this , any suggestion please ??

entry.title: How to get actual GST applicable for the material using ABAP?
entry.content:
Hi,

  I would like to know GST applied to the material code using ABAP. I would like to understand tables from where I can get actual rate e.g. 18% or 12%. I tried searching blogs and as per suggestions checked tax classification using MLAN, TAKM etc. tables but all entries showing 0 value. Is there any way I can find actual rate as 18% etc. As classification based on country code there could be export material also.

Regards,

PD
